text:
CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: N = Not a SNP for this Condition Category 
Y = SNP for this Condition Category 

COMMENT: The CCW constructs the plan characteristics file from information submitted by plan sponsors to 
CMS’s Health Plan Management System (HPMS). 

Only SNP plans are included in this file (i.e., there are no blank/missing values for this field).
